steps.title: Identify what effective comparison requires
steps.content: The question asks which choice “emphasize[s] a difference between the two birds.” This requires mentioning both birds AND creating a contrast—not describing them separately or highlighting similarities.

steps.title: Find the choice that contrasts both birds
steps.content: A uses the structure “Though they share... is larger” to emphasize the size difference between the two birds. B and D describe only one bird; C mentions both but focuses on what they share. That matches choice A — A is correct.
